items.title: Barry Diller’s IAC Agrees to Sell Care.com
items.description: The media conglomerate’s shares have been trading poorly and it has been streamlining itself to focus on core assets.

items.title: OpenAI's Altman admits defense deal 'looked opportunistic and sloppy' amid backlash
items.description: Sam Altman says that OpenAI "shouldn't have rushed" its deal with the Defense Department and was making "some additions."

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips As Trump Says This On Iran; Warren Buffett Stock Flashes Sell Signal (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index fell and other indexes were mixed after President Trump spoke on Iran. A Warren Buffett stock dived but Palantir popped. Oil and defense stocks rose.

items.title: Are the Magnificent Seven Stocks Losing Steam? Should You Buy, Hold, or Sell?
items.description: After powering the S&P 500 for years, the Magnificent Seven stocks are suddenly lagging in 2026. The smart play might be to do what the crowd isn’t doing.

items.title: Sable Offshore Stock Has Tanked 70% This Past Year, and One Fund Just Sold Off $6 Million in Shares
items.description: Operating three offshore platforms in California, Sable Offshore Corp. supplies crude oil and natural gas to U.S. customers.
